assumptions: The forward FX contract is a derivative financial instrument within the scope of IFRS 9.
Only accounting approaches explicitly grounded in the provided extracts are considered.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 paragraph 5.7.1 treats fair value changes on financial instruments measured at fair value as recognised in profit or loss unless a specified exception applies.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The extracts identify hedging relationships as a distinct IFRS 9 accounting model under which gains and losses on instruments such as forwards can be recognised outside ordinary FVTPL presentation.

approaches.label: Settlement date accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 paragraph 5.7.4 identifies settlement date accounting as a distinct recognition basis for instruments involving a period between trade date and settlement date.
